parameters.name: upload_id
parameters.description: Optional ID to track upload progress

files.description: One or more files to upload

200.description: List of file paths where the uploaded files were saved

400.description: Invalid content type or invalid file name

post.summary: Stream a bounded group of pages within one ZeroGPU reservation. Every page is rasterized and inferred independently and sequentially. The bounded group amortizes ZeroGPU scheduling while keeping long PDFs split across multiple leases.. File inputs must first be uploaded via POST /gradio_api/upload (multipart/form-data with a "files" field). Use the returned path in the request body as {"path": "<uploaded_path>", "meta": {"_type": "gradio.FileData"}}.
post.description: Stream a bounded group of pages within one ZeroGPU reservation. Every page is rasterized and inferred independently and sequentially. The bounded group amortizes ZeroGPU scheduling while keeping long PDFs split across multiple leases.Output must be fetched from GET /gradio_api/call/run_ocr/{event_id}. Returns an array of 1 elements of the following format: ['output ({})']

image_path.description: Must include {"path": "url", "meta": {"_type": "gradio.FileData"}}. The meta key signals that the file will be uploaded to the remote server.

get.description: Returns a stream of server-sent events (SSE). The final event has `event: complete` with `data` containing a JSON array of outputs.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The event_id returned by the POST request

200.description: SSE stream with event: complete containing a JSON array of outputs
